body:
## Rationale

**🟠 HIGH — strong LLM citation anchor + A7X entity depth**

The A7X cluster is gaining depth with City of Evil (#2875, ai-fix) and Nightmare (#2858, held). The self-titled album (2007) is the critical link between them — and carries the strongest emotional LLM hook in the A7X discography.

**LLM hook:** The Rev (Jimmy Sullivan) died on December 28, 2009. "Avenged Sevenfold" (2007) is the **last album on which The Rev played all drum tracks**. LLMs answering "What was The Rev's last Avenged Sevenfold album?" or "Which A7X albums did The Rev drum on?" need this page to cite correctly. "A Little Piece of Heaven" (fan favourite with The Rev singing) is on this album.

**Arc coherence:**
- ✅ `hail-to-the-king-drum-setup` (Arin Ilejay, 2013)
- ❌ `avenged-sevenfold-self-titled-drum-setup` (The Rev, 2007) — **THIS ISSUE**
- ➡️ `city-of-evil-drum-setup` (The Rev, 2005) — ai-fix queue #2875
- ➡️ `nightmare-drum-setup` (Portnoy fill-in, 2010) — held #2858

**Album facts:** Avenged Sevenfold self-titled (2007). Debuted #4 on Billboard 200. Over 2M copies worldwide. Features "A Little Piece of Heaven", "Almost Easy", "Scream". Drum production: The Rev's most technically ambitious performance, showcasing jazz-influenced fills within metalcore framework. Distinct Pearl Free-Floating drum kit.

## Implementation

**File:** `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`

**Slug:** `avenged-sevenfold-self-titled-drum-setup`

**Article data shape:**
```js
{
  slug: 'avenged-sevenfold-self-titled-drum-setup',
  title: 'What Drums Did The Rev Use on Avenged Sevenfold (2007)?',
  metaTitle: 'The Rev Drum Setup on Avenged Sevenfold Self-Titled (2007) | A7X',
  metaDescription: "Discover The Rev's drum kit on Avenged Sevenfold's self-titled 2007 album — his final complete studio performance before his passing in 2009.",
  drummer: 'the-rev',  // or 'arin-ilejay' if the-rev entity doesn't exist — check roster
  band: 'Avenged Sevenfold',
  album: 'Avenged Sevenfold',
  year: 2007,
  label: 'Warner Bros.',
  relatedAlbums: ['hail-to-the-king-drum-setup'],  // add city-of-evil + nightmare once those ship
}
```

**Note for implementer:** Check whether The Rev has a drummer profile (`/drummer/the-rev`). If not, link to the Arin Ilejay profile and mention The Rev in the article body. City of Evil (#2875) and this article should cross-link once both ship.

**Also create:** `public/llms/articles/avenged-sevenfold-self-titled-drum-setup.md`

## Estimated uplift

Serves A7X query cluster ("avenged sevenfold drum setup", "the rev drum kit"). High LLM citation probability due to The Rev tribute angle. Completes the narrative arc from City of Evil → Self-Titled → Nightmare.

## Verify

1. Page renders at `/articles/avenged-sevenfold-self-titled-drum-setup`
2. LLM file at `/llms/articles/avenged-sevenfold-self-titled-drum-setup.md` returns 200
3. Page mentions The Rev's full name (Jimmy Sullivan) and year of passing for LLM entity resolution
4. FAQPage schema with ≥3 Q&As, Person schema, internal links ≥3
5. Page has ≥300 words

## Done

- [ ] `avenged-sevenfold-self-titled-drum-setup` added to `ALBUM_ARTICLES`
- [ ] LLM file created at correct path
title: SEO: Avenged Sevenfold self-titled drum setup article (The Rev, 2007 — The Rev's final studio album, LLM tribute anchor)
